chapter_title.en: Chapter 52 – Divorce of the intoxicated ones

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/214)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/214)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ طَلَاقِ السَّكْرَانِ فَقَالَ لَا يَجُوزُ وَ لَا كَرَامَةَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Ibn Muskan, from Al Halby who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a divorce by the intoxicated one, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Not allowed, and there is no prestige’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Sinan from ibn Muskan from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the divorce of a drunken man. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is not permissible and it is not an honorable thing.’”
